records.m_Talk_ENG: What an unexpected turn of events. Or is this too fate?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What an unexpected turn of events. Or is this too fate?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What an unexpected turn of events. Or is this too fate?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The last to stand in my way had to be you. A <color=#ffd34c>Leo</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The last to stand in my way had to be you. A <color=#ffd34c>Leo</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The last to stand in my way had to be you. A <color=#ffd34c>Leo</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not even half a day has passed since Senior's death. How did you get here so quickly?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not even half a day has passed since Senior's death. How did you get here so quickly?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not even half a day has passed since Senior's death. How did you get here so quickly?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, didn't you already make a mistake before that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, didn't you already make a mistake before that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, didn't you already make a mistake before that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A mistake...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A mistake...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A mistake...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I had a strange experience a few days ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I had a strange experience a few days ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I had a strange experience a few days ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When a Counterside Effect occurred in Charade's Grand Dimension Crevice, someone took care of it instead of me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When a Counterside Effect occurred in Charade's Grand Dimension Crevice, someone took care of it instead of me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When a Counterside Effect occurred in Charade's Grand Dimension Crevice, someone took care of it instead of me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was glad at the time that it was one less annoying chore off my list, but the more I thought about it the weirder it got.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was glad at the time that it was one less annoying chore off my list, but the more I thought about it the weirder it got.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was glad at the time that it was one less annoying chore off my list, but the more I thought about it the weirder it got.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No one in Charade is foolish enough to give out favors without something in return.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No one in Charade is foolish enough to give out favors without something in return.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No one in Charade is foolish enough to give out favors without something in return.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, when I heard Richard was dead, I could get here right away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, when I heard Richard was dead, I could get here right away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, when I heard Richard was dead, I could get here right away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the culprit who impersonated me killed Richard, then this person must have similar business in the Grand Dimension Crevices of other cities, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the culprit who impersonated me killed Richard, then this person must have similar business in the Grand Dimension Crevices of other cities, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the culprit who impersonated me killed Richard, then this person must have similar business in the Grand Dimension Crevices of other cities, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But there are five other Grand Dimension Crevices besides Charade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But there are five other Grand Dimension Crevices besides Charade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But there are five other Grand Dimension Crevices besides Charade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How did you know I would target the one in Lotus?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How did you know I would target the one in Lotus?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How did you know I would target the one in Lotus?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, that? Just a hunch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, that? Just a hunch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, that? Just a hunch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A woman's intuition, if you will? But who cares? I got it right, didn't I?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A woman's intuition, if you will? But who cares? I got it right, didn't I?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A woman's intuition, if you will? But who cares? I got it right, didn't I?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. That's interesting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. That's interesting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. That's interesting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems my interpretation of you was wrong. I should have paid more attention while acting as you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems my interpretation of you was wrong. I should have paid more attention while acting as you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems my interpretation of you was wrong. I should have paid more attention while acting as you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? Are you going to avenge Richard? That doesn't seem like you, though.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? Are you going to avenge Richard? That doesn't seem like you, though.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? Are you going to avenge Richard? That doesn't seem like you, though.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Avenge? Hmm, I'm not so sure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Avenge? Hmm, I'm not so sure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Avenge? Hmm, I'm not so sure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then again, no one in the real world acts exactly like characters in a play, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then again, no one in the real world acts exactly like characters in a play, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then again, no one in the real world acts exactly like characters in a play, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: He was an annoying guy. He always nagged me as if I were still young child.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He was an annoying guy. He always nagged me as if I were still young child.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He was an annoying guy. He always nagged me as if I were still young child.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like we don't know he's an ex-soldier. So stuffy, you know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like we don't know he's an ex-soldier. So stuffy, you know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like we don't know he's an ex-soldier. So stuffy, you know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It would've been a win-win for everyone involved if he took some bribes and helped out around the companies, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It would've been a win-win for everyone involved if he took some bribes and helped out around the companies, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It would've been a win-win for everyone involved if he took some bribes and helped out around the companies, don't you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But still...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But still...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But still...

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, that's exactly why this damned city needed someone like him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, that's exactly why this damned city needed someone like him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, that's exactly why this damned city needed someone like him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, that's enough of sentimental stories for today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, that's enough of sentimental stories for today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, that's enough of sentimental stories for today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're both busy, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're both busy, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're both busy, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How arrogant. Even if you are an Administration confirmed Grade S Counter, it'll prove difficult to take me on by yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How arrogant. Even if you are an Administration confirmed Grade S Counter, it'll prove difficult to take me on by yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How arrogant. Even if you are an Administration confirmed Grade S Counter, it'll prove difficult to take me on by yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Plus, you have laid down your title as champion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Plus, you have laid down your title as champion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Plus, you have laid down your title as champion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What more meaning would the dishonorable name <color=#ffd34c>Ozymandias</color> have now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What more meaning would the dishonorable name <color=#ffd34c>Ozymandias</color> have now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What more meaning would the dishonorable name <color=#ffd34c>Ozymandias</color> have now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Honor?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Honor?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Honor?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I'm a little disappointed in you as an entertainer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I'm a little disappointed in you as an entertainer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I'm a little disappointed in you as an entertainer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You earn honor, not protect it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You earn honor, not protect it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You earn honor, not protect it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And matches are more fun when you're the challenger and not the champion, you know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And matches are more fun when you're the challenger and not the champion, you know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And matches are more fun when you're the challenger and not the champion, you know.
